Body.Content:
We’re excited to announce two new Copilot skills in the SharePoint Admin Center:

1. Step-by-Step Task Guidance

Copilot can now walk you through the exact steps required to complete common admin tasks.

Example: “How can I find sites that are potentially over-permissioned?”

What to expect: Copilot will recommend clear, sequential instructions to guide you from start to finish.

2. Multi-Criteria Site Search

Copilot can help you find sites using multiple conditions at once.

Example: “Find sites that have been inactive for more than 60 days and are shared externally.”

What to expect: Copilot will generate a filtered list of sites that meet your criteria and suggest recommended actions.

GA date: October CY2025
